programme.desc: Human emotions is at the heart of American Idol, as we watch ordinary people bring their dreams and ambitions to the famous stage. American Idol contunues to be the world’s favourite singing competition!

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Hosted by Daytime Emmy Award® winning host Steve Harvey, Family Feud brings all new hilarious moments and families as they compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions posed to 100 people surveyed.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4
programme.desc: Barry (Troy Gentile) sets out to defy Murray (Jeff Garlin) and become a P.E. teacher. Erica (Hayley Orrantia) looks to be a video-dating matchmaker for Lainey’s (AJ Michalka) dad.

programme.title: Armor

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: The War Of The Rohirrim

programme.title: Superman

programme.title: London Calling

programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams is taken hostage, Nathan turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected strength in the fight to get her back.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Skip and Chip have a big fight, and it's up to Lazlo to get them back together again.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: All the campers vie to become Camp Kidney's newest mascot; unfortunately, there can be only one winner.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Edward 'earns' enough badges to become the first camper ever to graduate from Camp Kidney--but does he want to go?

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Edward gets bit by a wood gnome, and he discovers that this is no little mosquito bite!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Raj and Smason fight over a secret hotsprings only to end up shriveled raisins from soaking in it too long.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Miss Mucous volunteers to help the Bean Scouts pass their fitness test, but secretly she's out to destroy Camp Kidney.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Camp Kidney puts on a informative play about the seven types of poisonous sandwhiches, but unfortunately there can be only one starring role.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1
programme.desc: Lazlo gets a new best friend. It's not another camper but a parasitic leech that is stuck to his head!

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Follow the minion trio as they venture out into the world to find a new evil boss for their brethren to follow.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: This star-packed extravaganza brings the comic book legend to the big screen where an infant superhero is sent to Earth just as his home planet, Krypton, explodes.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition’s fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal – however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances. Back to basics. It’s going to be a true slug-match to see who has the skills and who has the drive to take the one thing that has eluded them all… the title of Top Chef! Padma Lakshmi, Tom Colicchio, and Gail Simmons return as judges and joining them as the first guest judge of the season is legendary Chef, Jeremiah Tower. Marcus Samuelsson, Nancy Silverton, Michael Cimarusti, Josiah Citrin, Suzanne Goin, Caroline Styne share the table for the high-powered, high-stress beach-side meal.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold’s last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold’s friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station. Noted food writer and personal friend of Jonathan Gold, Ruth Reichl serves as guest judge alongside Padma, Tom and Gail.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. Guest Judge Ludo Lefebvre joins Tom, Padma and Gail, as well as guest diners Chefs Ray Garcia, Sara Hymanson, Sarah Kramer and Craig Thornton.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: The most loveable criminal mastermind and his army of incomprehensible, yet adorable, yellow minions are back for a fourth instalment filled with outrageous adventures and family shenanigans.

programme.title: Craig Before The Creek
programme.desc: The epic finale of the quest for the Heart of the Forest.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts And Where To Find Them
programme.desc: A Magizoologist arrives in New York amid tensions in the wizarding world only to be branded as a fugitive as he tries to recover his missing beasts.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Rex and co. must rescue Providence agents who are trapped in a savage secluded evo hotspot.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Noah convinces Rex to be his wingman on prom night, but Rex must split his time fighting an evo.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Providence encounters a street gang of teenage evos and are shocked to discover that Rex was once a member!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: The evil computer ZAG RS returns to take control of all nanites in this nail-biting outer space adventure!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: The Pack is feverishly trying to resurrect Van Kleiss, but they need Rex's help, or the world will succumb to a deadly nanite invasion!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Tiny, metal-munching evo wasps are destroying everything, and Rex and co must stop them.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: After a round of smack-talking, Rex agrees to go through Providence boot camp and drags Noah along for the ride.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Rex is 15, and like most 15-year-old boys, he likes cars, girls, music and sports. But unlike most 15-year-old boys, he can make his fists the size of boulders.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: In this flashback story, we see how Rex became a part of Providence.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Van Kleiss and his Pack take over the Keep and invade Providence HQ!

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: 12 young chefs enter the Top Chef Junior kitchen to kick off the second season. As they celebrate & get to know each other better, Host Vanessa Lachey & Head Judge Curtis Stone reveal a surprise Quickfire Challenge: The chefs must make one perfect bite, but there’s a shocking twist! For their first Elimination Challenge, the chefs must cook for the Top Chef Junior Food Festival and the competition is tough! Food festivals are a great opportunity to showcase talent and make a mark in the culinary world, but it's a difficult task when there are so many choices available and every chef is putting their best foot forward. The top 12 must each present a dish they hope stands out from the crowd.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: Most of the chefs are very familiar with the main ingredient for this Quickfire Challenge: instant ramen! But Host Vanessa Lachey and Guest Judge Sheldon Simeon aren’t looking for the 5-minute version. Instead, the chefs have access to all the ingredients in the Top Chef Junior pantry to put their own spin on this popular dish. For their Elimination Challenge, the chefs are woken up by a surprise knock at their door and discover it's time to get cracking on a scrumptious brunch dish they’ll cook in their own rooms and serve to the judges on a roof top terrace!

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: It’s all fun and games when the chefs must play the classic arcade game “Alley Roller” in their Quickfire Challenge in order to earn prizes & pizza ingredients to impress Actress & Guest Judge, Busy Phillips. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs must turn 5 ingredients kids typically avoid into delicious dishes! The chefs work in teams and battle it out head-to head in this 5 round cook-off for a special group of young judges.

programme.desc: A competition will be held between three schools of wizardry. The Goblet of Fire makes its final selection for the competition - Harry Potter.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From dusty small-town roots, to the glitter of Hollywood, and then on to commanding the world stage, REAGAN is a journey of overcoming the odds.

programme.title: Wifelike
programme.desc: Designed to behave like the late wife of a detective, an artificial human questions her reality as memories of a past life begin to resurface.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: When an executive's ex-boyfriend travels through time and brings back a 19th century nobleman, she reluctantly takes responsibility for showing him the 21st century.

programme.title: Single In Seoul

programme.title: Hear Me: Our Summer
programme.desc: Yong-jun is working as a delivery man when he meets and instantly falls for Yeo-reum, the devoted sister of a gifter deaf swimmer. Yeo-reum slowly opens her heart to warm-hearted Yong-jun.

programme.title: The Moon
programme.desc: An astronaut is left stranded in space because of an accident during a spaceflight. The former director of the space centre strives to bring him home safely...

programme.desc: Drained from her life in the city, a young cellist moves to a quiet small town, where she encounters an old friend who helps her heal and remake herself.

programme.desc: Detonation of an explosive device causes terror in the flight and pilot Gyu-Sik loses sight in one eye. Yong-dae who hatched the hijacking plot, threatens to take the plane to North Korea.

programme.title: Because I Love You

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales

Then one very dark night in Tinga Tinga, the Moon and the Stars disappear! The animals summon the birds to tell Lion… but Woodpecker can't pass the message on! Distraught, Woodpecker flies up to the skies… but where are the stars?! And where is the Moon?! In desperation Woodpecker pecks at the dark sky… and a star comes back, then another, then another! Everyone is delighted, no beast more than Woodpecker who now has her very own special sound… pecking.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The Humboldt Current is slower than most ocean currents but it’s the most dynamic in the world because it travels for such a long distance. Upwelling from the deepest trenches brings nutrients to the surface allowing phytoplankton to bloom laying the foundation for an intricate marine food chain

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Flamingo stood on both legs. One morning, Flamingo and her flock landed at the Water Hole when all the crabs were busy performing their underwater dance. Needless to say, all these legs where in their way! Tortoise came up with the plan that if all Crabs each nipped a flamingo leg, there will be room to share the waterhole. So from then on, Flamingo stood on one legs and Crabs were able to perform their dance in the watering hole

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Woodpecker didn't peck. All the birds had their very own sound, but Woodpecker didn't make a sound at all. Then one very dark night in Tinga Tinga, the Moon and the Stars disappear! The animals summon the birds to tell Lion… but Woodpecker can't pass the message on! Distraught, Woodpecker flies up to the skies… but where are the stars?! And where is the Moon?! In desperation Woodpecker pecks at the dark sky… and a star comes back, then another, then another! Everyone is delighted, no beast more than Woodpecker who now has her very own special sound… pecking.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When a deadly secret resurfaces, five friends are stalked by a vengeful killer.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: Teams continue racing in Vietnam and face the hustle and bustle of a congested Vietnamese market, where they must properly set up a fish stand and deliver mattresses to a local hotel.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Tess and Sunny join Jake to find the killer of an unknown bride found on a desolate beach in her wedding gown as they navigate whether they can still trust Lieutenant Bennett. Stakes rise as the bridal party’s florist is found dead while our team discovers that the first victim and her grieving fiancee were once on opposite ends of the law... and running from a past that has finally caught up to them. Meanwhile, Sunny tries not to let on that she’s still distraught after 110’s home invasion. And Mia helps Tess find answers to a new facet of her sight loss.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a murder investigation at a famous New York toy store spirals into a hostage crisis, Elsbeth must negotiate with Nolan, the hapless ex-con inside. Captain Wagner clashes with a rival whose reckless tactics could turn the standoff deadly.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Westside Hospital launches an investigation into Amy's hacked accounts.

programme.title: XXX
programme.desc: A former extreme sports athlete is recruited by the government for a special undercover mission.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior (Season 15)
programme.desc: The semifinals wrap up in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to six challenging obstacles and race head-to-head for a spot in the national finals.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a murder investigation at a famous New York toy store spirals into a hostage crisis, Elsbeth must negotiate with Nolan, the hapless ex-con inside. Captain Wagner clashes with a rival whose reckless tactics could turn the standoff deadly.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted (Season 6)
programme.desc: The Fugitive Task Force is called in to hunt down a missing teen from New Jersey who has a connection to a classmate’s recent suicide. Meanwhile, Cora feels Ray and his father are putting too much pressure on Caleb.

programme.title: NCSI: Origins (Season 2)

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: A kung fu prodigy trains with two legends to face a new rival in an epic martial arts showdown.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4)
programme.desc: As Chris (Lina Esco) tries to rescue a young woman from a cult run by a corrupt pastor, tensions rise between Hondo (Shemar Moore) and Leroy (Michael Beach).

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4)
programme.desc: As a sniper begins targeting the L.A. Fire Department, a phone call from Street's (Alex Russell) mother drives a wedge between him and Molly (Laura James).

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4)
programme.desc: As Deacon (Jay Harrington) wrestles with a big decision about his daughter's future, S.W.A.T. chases a white supremacist group responsible for a series of hate crimes across the city.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: Teams travel more than 2,000 miles from Vietnam to India where they must balance traditional pots on their heads while performing a folk dance, and assemble a life-size, three-dimensional mural.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: For the first time in The Amazing Race history, the votes for the mandatory U-turn are in, and one team must complete both detours in India, bundling up flowers and transporting building materials on rickshaws in the bustling streets of Jaipur.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a murder investigation at a famous New York toy store spirals into a hostage crisis, Elsbeth must negotiate with Nolan, the hapless ex-con inside. Captain Wagner clashes with a rival whose reckless tactics could turn the standoff deadly.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Switzerland's Crumbling Giants
programme.desc: Switzerland's iconic mountains are truly one of the wonders of the world, famous for their dramatic snow-capped peaks. But the Swiss Alps are under threat and in turn putting centuries old villages below them in grave danger.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 8
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year - Episode 2
programme.desc: Nine artists have 4 hours to create portraits of Drag Queen Courtney Act, Actor Mark Coles Smith and film critic Margaret Pomeranz, each with a personal item. The judges select a top 3, and 1 advances to the semi-final.

programme.title: Asia News Week - Episode 9
programme.desc: Yvonne Yong brings you a weekly roundup of the stories making news across the Asia region, plus what's trending on social media and making an impact on the culture and the way people live.

programme.title: Girls Can't Surf
programme.desc: The untold story of how a band of renegade surfer girls in the 1980s fought to create their own professional sport, changing surf culture forever.

programme.desc: Switzerland's iconic mountains are truly one of the wonders of the world, famous for their dramatic snow-capped peaks. But the Swiss Alps are under threat and in turn putting centuries old villages below them in grave danger.

programme.title: The Pacific - The Untold Story: China in the Pacific
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines of power struggles and politics we uncover the story of China in the Pacific. We hear directly from Chinese communities and Pacific Islanders about identity, belonging and the tensions shaping the future.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 8
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: In Conversation with Sachin Tendulkar
programme.desc: A masterclass with the Little Master. Paul Kennedy travelled to India for an exclusive one-on-one conversation with Sachin Tendulkar covering his batting technique, aggressive play, focus and deep love of cricket.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - One-on-One with Ana-Lise Sio
programme.desc: Tiana Penitani sits down with ACT Brumbies star Ana-Lise Sio to talk family, faith, and footy in this special one-on-one episode.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 22
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your Sunday. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 22
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: Insiders - Episode 8
programme.desc: David Speers and the panel discuss the week in politics including the RBA's next decision on interest rates, the federal budget, plus the Liberals and One Nation face an electoral test at the South Australian State Election.

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 7
programme.desc: Abbey Gelmi and the panel discuss the week in sport including the Matildas at the Women's Asian Cup, AFL and NRL news, Super Rugby, A-League and more.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Play On - Episode 1
programme.desc: Series 2 takes audiences into the inner sanctum of a Fijian rugby team, a suburban cricket team captained by a former Sri Lankan superstar and up close to the grit and tenacity of the Tiwi Bombers.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 4
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 22
programme.desc: Lorna Dunkley presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 8
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Abebe - Butterfly Song
programme.desc: An exploration and celebration of the enduring cross-cultural friendship between Papua New Guinea's most celebrated singer-songwriter George Telek and acclaimed Australian musician David Bridie.

programme.title: Out Of Africa
programme.desc: In 20th-century colonial Kenya, a Danish baroness/plantation owner has a passionate love affair with a free-spirited big-game hunter.

programme.title: One Flew Over The Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: A rebellious convict is sent to a psychiatric hospital for evaluation in 1963 Oregon, and encourages his docile companions to take more control of their lives and defy the tyrannical head nurse.

programme.title: On The Waterfront
programme.desc: A brutally realistic tour de force chronicling the conflict between a corrupt labor boss and a crusading Catholic priest.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: When risk-averse Reuben Feffer's bride dumps him on their honeymoon, his life is thrown completely off track, until, a chance encounter with Polly, an adventure craving, childhood friend.

programme.title: One Flew Over The Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: A rebellious convict is sent to a psychiatric hospital for evaluation in 1963 Oregon, and encourages his docile companions to take more control of their lives and defy the tyrannical head nurse.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Jim Carrey and Cameron Diaz star in this story of a sweet, socially inept bank teller who discovers a mask that transforms him into a superhero ... but one whom you may not want to call for help.

programme.title: Rocky
programme.desc: A small-time Philadelphia boxer gets a supremely rare chance to fight the world heavyweight champion in a bout in which he strives to go the distance for his self-respect.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: A lawyer blinded by radioactive waste fights crime as an acrobatic martial arts superhero, using his other senses, which have been enhanced.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: When risk-averse Reuben Feffer's bride dumps him on their honeymoon, his life is thrown completely off track, until, a chance encounter with Polly, an adventure craving, childhood friend.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: Two of the warped writers of Scary Movie now set their parodic sights on the largest genre of them all: Hollywood's big-budget, special effects-laden, blockbuster franchise films.

programme.title: Rocky
programme.desc: A small-time Philadelphia boxer gets a supremely rare chance to fight the world heavyweight champion in a bout in which he strives to go the distance for his self-respect.

programme.title: The Mafia's Manager
programme.desc: Taiwanese police received a tip off that a mysterious manager in the Taiwanese mafia was getting on a flight to Jakarta. They had just 6 hours to identify him to their counterparts in Jakarta.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Agent Dominick Polifrone poses as a mobster to stop the Iceman; Det. Carlos James goes undercover to thwart a plot against a woman's ex.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)
programme.desc: A woman calls 911 with a story of being abducted and forced into the trunk of her car by a masked assailant who fatally shoots her girlfriend.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A brave grandma fights off two carjackers intent on stealing her truck; a woman stands up against heinous domestic violence; two assailants pull a gun on a store manager who escapes.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: An auto parts store owner turns the tables on an armed assailant by taking his gun; an armoured car driver survives a terrifying attack; a hotel clerk flips the script on an armed robber. And more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A man gets stuck in a chimney while trying to rob a house; pet store owners catch a thief with stolen snakes in his pants; and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man takes an alligator grocery shopping; an alleged thief tries a strange tactic to mask his identity; and more!

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When a Christian ranch hand, Dan Lavigne, 52, is shot dead on his porch in Montana, 2002, deputies find no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When teens Llianna Adank and Eric Goldstrand are found shot to death at an Oregon park in 1977, every parent's nightmare comes true.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, one man is struggling to feed his kids while another is surprised to find he owes child support. A woman is indignant to learn she's been arrested for getting drunk in a bar.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: 10-year-old Karen Pedley was hailed a hero when she saved her family from a fire. That event triggered a lifelong obsession, one which would lead to her setting alight the nursing home where she worked.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A domestic violence defendant loses his temper during a virtual hearing; grieving parents speak directly to their sons' killer; a judge has strong words for a teen arsonist; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: An accused burglar keeps falling asleep during his virtual hearing; a judge has no time for Sovereign Citizen tactics; a drunk school bus driver shows up impaired for his plea hearing; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: When a Mobile mother of four is shot just blocks from her home, detectives look to her loved ones to identify her killer. But, at trial, his attorneys claim he acted in self-defence.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: A deadly church bombing stuns a small Illinois county, sending law enforcement scrambling for answers. Then it happens again.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story with Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Five years after she was groomed and abducted by the most popular teacher in school, Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal, with famed kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: After an argument in his home, a man answers a knock at his front door and is suddenly shot and killed.

programme.desc: Vangie, Georgie, Samantha and Diane are best of friends who encounter different journeys in life as they go through college. Their friendship gets tested when Diane and Georgie fight over the affections of college heartthrob Louie, while Samantha discovers that Vangie is her dad's young mistress.

programme.title: Kurdapya ep 12
programme.desc: Kurdapya tells the story of long-lost twins, KURING & DAPHNE. They meet after a strange accident and discover that they lead extremely different lives. Kuring grew up with the cruel extended family in the province while Daphne is an undervalued publishing executive in the city. Both women want to get out of their current realities, so they decide to switch lives by pretending to be each other.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Haunted by a colleague's suicide and grappling with guilt, Helen Dorn confronts the unspoken accusations of her fellow officers. At the same time, she is assigned to solve a medical student's murder, where she soon uncovers their double life.

programme.title: Martinez
programme.desc: Martinez, an embittered Chilean in his sixties who has lived in Mexico for the past 40 years, is being forced to retire from his job. As he struggles with life changes, things change as a neighbour suddenly dies.

programme.title: Victoria Must Go
programme.desc: Hedvig and Henrik's new stepmother Victoria is annoying and constantly introducing new rules. They decide to hire a hitman to get rid of her, and end up persuading a very reluctant immigrant, Carl, to do the job.

programme.title: Submission
programme.desc: Lúcia is raped by her husband and presses charges against him. In her quest for justice, she must battle her husband who is the son of the State's Vice Attorney, and the Portuguese legal system with its patriarchal beliefs.

programme.title: A Tale of Samurai Cooking - A True Love Story
programme.desc: Great cook Haru has married into the legendary “Kitchen Samurai” family. But her husband who is the successor of the Funaki family cannot cook at all. Haru makes a vow to make him a superb samurai chef and starts teaching her new husband how to cook.

programme.title: Djam
programme.desc: Djam, a bold young Greek woman, travels to Istanbul to look for an engine part for her uncle’s boat. She meets a stranded and penniless Avril, who is a volunteer for Syrian refugees. Together, they embark on a lively, music-filled journey to Mytilene.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.

programme.title: El Alamein – The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Perched Forest
programme.desc: Commissioner Macéna shows Captain Kandinsky a letter from a ten-year-old boy who claims that a monster in his village forest is behind a string of disappearances. Kandinsky begins the investigation when the boy threatens to confront the culprit himself.

programme.title: Sarah Kohr: Ghosts Of The Past

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places - EP 17
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.

programme.title: New Stirrings - EP 3

Watch Tetamu Ramadan a family drama filled with secrets.

programme.title: Djam
programme.desc: Djam, a bold young Greek woman, travels to Istanbul to look for an engine part for her uncle’s boat. She meets a stranded and penniless Avril, who is a volunteer for Syrian refugees. Together, they embark on a lively, music-filled journey to Mytilene.

programme.title: El Alamein – The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: Sarah Kohr: Ghosts Of The Past
programme.desc: Ex-gang leader Degen escapes prison after 19 years, putting inspector Sarah Kohr and prosecutor Anton Mehringer in danger. Unable to count on the authorities without risking their secrets, they must confront their pasts when Degen kidnaps Anton's son.

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: When photographer Marlene's son Jason faces a life-altering skateboarding accident, their journey to healing takes unexpected turns. As they travel from Berlin to Switzerland, Jason slowly convinces his mother that life takes detours.

programme.title: Oddball
programme.desc: An eccentric chicken farmer, with the help of his granddaughter, trains his mischievous dog Oddball to protect a penguin sanctuary from fox attacks in an attempt to reunite his family and save their seaside town.

programme.title: Ghost Mountaineer
programme.desc: In the former Soviet Union, a group of Estonian students go hiking in Siberia. After their unpopular leader Olle vanishes, his rival Eero leads the group to seek help, and a series of bizarre and terrifying events unfold.

programme.title: Cortina Express
programme.desc: During the Christmas holidays in Cortina, a colorful cast of characters cross paths among the snow-capped Ampezzo mountains. Between love, redemption, and second-chances, their lives collide in a series of hilarious and heartfelt quests for a happy ending

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: Sarah Kohr: Ghost Lights
programme.desc: In a post-pandemic Europe, conspiracy theorist Felix Morgenroth becomes obsessed with exposing the "coronavirus lie." Convinced that physicians Carsten and Lisa Kippmann were behind the conspiracy, Felix seeks retribution through a devastating explosion.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Red Cloth
programme.desc: A fatal arson incident draws Helen Dorn into a far-left extremist community, who has targeted wealthy real estate agent Ralph Wagner. While they deny any involvement in the crime, it is indeed suspicious that they were previously almost ousted by Wagner.

programme.title: Stormskerry Maja
programme.desc: At 17, Maja marries humble fisherman Janne and starts a family on the remote island of Stormskerry, where survival is a constant challenge. Amidst the hardships, Maja awakens to her potential, finding resilience and a love that transcends life and death.

programme.title: Sweet Squad
programme.desc: In Kalimantan Barat, teenager Rizal faces a daunting choice to become a sugar courier across the Indonesian-Malaysian border to fund his mother's medical bills. With friends Iwan and Ajung, they risk it all for a chance at saving his mother’s life.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Right To Remain Silent
programme.desc: During a hunting trip, Rolf Kanther, director of a military tech manufacturer, is shot right next to his daughter. Inspector Helen Dorn is sent to investigate the suspicious death, and needs to find out if it's an accident or a calculated murder.
